metadata.description: Local marketplace for dhx-owned Claude Code plugins. Hosts plugin manifests that register hooks outside settings.json to survive CC's atomic settings-rename clobber (see reports/2026-04-16-shared-settings-rewriter.md).

plugins.name: dhx
plugins.description: dhx SessionStart hooks: health-check cache writer and dirty-tree reporter. Registered here instead of settings.json because plugin-sourced hooks are immune to CC's in-memory settings clobber.
